name: Arturo Fuente Rosado Sungrown Robusto
description: The Arturo Fuente Rosado Sungrown showcases a beautifully oily Ecuadorian habano wrapper grown under the sun for extra body. Expect a creamy, spicy, and deeply satisfying medium smoke with notes of cedar and cinnamon.

name: Arturo Fuente Rosado Sungrown Toro
description: The Toro format of the Rosado Sungrown offers a longer, more complex journey through Fuente's signature Dominican tobaccos wrapped in a gorgeous oily sungrown leaf. Creamy and spicy with a smooth, lingering finish.

name: Arturo Fuente Anejo No. 46
description: Aged in XO cognac barrels, the Fuente Anejo No. 46 is a medium-full bodied masterpiece featuring a dark Connecticut Broadleaf wrapper infused with rich cognac sweetness. One of the most sought-after cigars from the Fuente portfolio.

name: Arturo Fuente Anejo No. 50
description: The Anejo No. 50 is a larger ring gauge version in the cognac barrel-aged series, offering even more complexity and a longer smoke time. Dark, sweet, and richly layered — an annual release that disappears fast.

name: Arturo Fuente Anejo No. 58
description: The flagship of the Anejo line, the No. 58 Toro is aged in premium cognac barrels and features the largest ring gauge in the series. Complex, lush, and deeply satisfying with a two-hour smoking experience that reveals layer after layer.

name: Arturo Fuente ExCaliber No. I
description: The ExCaliber No. I is one of the largest cigars in the Hoyo de Monterrey ExCaliber line produced at Fuente's Honduran factory. A long, smooth smoke with classic cedar and earthy Honduran character.

name: Arturo Fuente ExCaliber No. VII
description: The ExCaliber No. VII is a robusto-sized entry in the classic Fuente ExCaliber series, offering an approachable medium-bodied Honduran smoke with consistent cedar and nutty notes at an exceptional value.

name: Arturo Fuente Short Story
description: The Short Story is Arturo Fuente's classic petit corona featuring a beautiful Cameroon wrapper over Dominican tobaccos. Mild to medium in strength, it delivers a sweet, nutty, and creamy smoke perfect for a quick enjoyment.

name: Arturo Fuente Brevas Royale
description: A classic Arturo Fuente corona featuring the iconic Cameroon wrapper that made the brand famous. The Brevas Royale is smooth, creamy, and full of cocoa and cedar notes — an everyday cigar of remarkable quality.

name: Arturo Fuente Curly Head Deluxe
description: The Curly Head Deluxe features a hand-folded cap giving it its distinctive name, wrapped in a natural Cameroon leaf. One of Fuente's classic value-oriented offerings, delivering consistent quality and smooth Dominican character.

name: Arturo Fuente Chateau Fuente Natural
description: The Chateau Fuente Natural is a beloved everyday cigar dressed in a Cameroon wrapper with a classic box-pressed feel. It consistently delivers the smooth, creamy character that has made Arturo Fuente one of America's most trusted cigar brands.

name: Arturo Fuente Rosado Sungrown Magnum R
description: The Rosado Sungrown Magnum R is the oversized gordo expression in the Rosado line, allowing the oily sungrown wrapper to fully express its spice and richness. Full of body and complex layering, it is one of Fuente's boldest non-OpusX offerings.

name: AVO Classic No. 1
description: The AVO Classic No. 1 is AVO Uvezian's original cigar presented in a classic Churchill format. Wrapped in Connecticut shade over Dominican tobaccos, it is a smooth, creamy, and elegantly crafted mild-to-medium cigar beloved by aficionados worldwide.

name: AVO Classic No. 5
description: A streamlined corona expression of the AVO Classic line, the No. 5 delivers the same creamy Connecticut Shade elegance as the flagship in a shorter, quicker format perfect for the midday smoker.

name: AVO Classic No. 7
description: The AVO Classic No. 7 is a lonsdale-sized expression of AVO's flagship Connecticut Shade line, offering a longer draw and slightly more floral complexity than the shorter formats. Silky smooth and unmistakably AVO in character.

name: AVO Classic Belicoso
description: AVO's Classic Belicoso features the brand's classic Connecticut Shade wrapper in an elegant tapered vitola that concentrates flavors and provides a concentrated, creamy draw at the tip. Beautifully made at the Davidoff factory in the Dominican Republic.

name: AVO Syncro South America Ritmo
description: The AVO Syncro South America Ritmo wraps Dominican and Nicaraguan tobaccos in a beautiful Brazilian Mata Fina dark wrapper, channeling South American tobacco traditions into a rich, medium-full bodied smoke with dark chocolate and espresso notes.

name: AVO Syncro Nicaragua Fogata
description: The Fogata is the boldest entry in the AVO Syncro Nicaragua line, featuring a Nicaraguan Jalapa wrapper for added spice and body. It brings the pepper and earthiness of Jalapa tobacco into AVO's elegant blending style with impressive results.

name: AVO Domaine No. 10
description: The AVO Domaine No. 10 uses filler tobaccos aged a full decade before rolling, resulting in exceptional smoothness and refined complexity. The Connecticut Shade wrapper crowns this elegant Dominican blend with creamy, honeyed notes.

name: AVO Heritage Robusto
description: The AVO Heritage Robusto pays tribute to AVO Uvezian's original vision with an Ecuadorian Connecticut wrapper over aged Dominican tobaccos. It is smooth, lightly spiced, and expertly crafted at the Davidoff factory in Santiago.

name: AVO XO Maestoso
description: The AVO XO Maestoso is the grande size in the AVO XO series, offering a long luxurious smoke of creamy Connecticut Shade elegance. Named after a musical tempo, it is a full, majestic cigar experience befitting AVO's roots as a jazz musician's creation.

name: AVO Improvisation Series Short Fill
description: AVO's Improvisation Series Short Fill is a compact yet flavorful cigar in the tradition of AVO's creative spirit. Featuring a Connecticut Shade wrapper over Dominican tobaccos, it is a perfect quick smoke with all the elegant character of the full AVO line.

name: Gran Habano No. 3 Habano Robusto
description: The Gran Habano No. 3 Habano is one of the brand's core lines, featuring a Honduran Habano wrapper over Nicaraguan and Honduran tobaccos. Medium-bodied with cedar, earthy, and spicy characteristics at an outstanding value price.

name: Gran Habano Classic Connecticut Robusto
description: Gran Habano's Classic Connecticut line brings a mild-to-medium profile to the brand's Honduran-made cigars. The Ecuadorian Connecticut wrapper imparts creamy, nutty, and cedary notes in a smooth and accessible package.

name: Gran Habano Corojo No. 5 Robusto
description: Gran Habano's Corojo No. 5 features a rich Honduran Corojo wrapper known for its peppery and leathery bite. This medium-full bodied robusto delivers the spicy, earthy complexity of classic Honduran corojo tobacco at a wallet-friendly price.

name: Gran Habano Vintage 1997
description: Gran Habano Vintage 1997 uses Nicaraguan leaf from the renowned 1997 harvest, aged to perfection and paired with a beautiful Ecuadorian Habano wrapper. Rich, complex, and full-bodied with excellent balance and a long, satisfying finish.

name: Gran Habano George Rico S.O.S. Signature
description: The George Rico S.O.S. Signature series represents master blender George Rico's personal expression for Gran Habano, featuring premium Ecuadorian Habano leaf over a carefully selected Nicaraguan and Honduran filler blend.

name: Gran Habano Blue in Green Maduro
description: The Gran Habano Blue in Green Maduro is a dark, rich medium-full cigar featuring a Connecticut Broadleaf Maduro wrapper over Nicaraguan and Honduran tobaccos. Named after the famous Miles Davis jazz album, it offers a soulful, complex smoking experience.

name: Gran Habano Tres Reyes Robusto
description: The Tres Reyes (Three Kings) line from Gran Habano blends tobacco from three countries under an Ecuadorian Sumatra wrapper. The result is a medium-bodied robusto with earthy, spicy notes and a smooth Sumatran character.

name: Gran Habano Passion Maduro Robusto
description: Gran Habano's Passion Maduro wraps its Nicaraguan and Honduran blend in a rich, oily Mexican San Andrés Maduro leaf. Dark and satisfying, this medium-full bodied robusto delivers chocolate, coffee, and earthy depth with excellent construction.

name: Nat Sherman Host Selection University
description: The Nat Sherman Host Selection University is a classic Connecticut Shade corona blended for smooth, creamy enjoyment. Part of Sherman's classic Host Selection portfolio, it offers a quintessential New York-style mild-medium cigar experience.

name: Nat Sherman Metropolitan Selection Gotham
description: The Metropolitan Selection Gotham reflects Nat Sherman's New York City heritage in a compact, elegant short robusto. Wrapped in Ecuadorian Connecticut and filled with Dominican tobaccos, it is a smooth, creamy, and satisfying everyday smoke.

name: Nat Sherman Panamerica Robusto
description: The Nat Sherman Panamerica is a medium-bodied robusto blended entirely with Central American tobaccos, showcasing the earthy, cedar-forward character of Honduran and Nicaraguan tobacco under a Honduran Habano wrapper.

name: Nat Sherman Timeless Prestige Toro
description: The Timeless Prestige Toro uses a Pennsylvania Broadleaf Maduro wrapper to add dark sweetness and richness to the refined Dominican filler blend. A medium to medium-full smoke with an impressive depth of flavor and Nat Sherman's signature elegance.

name: Nat Sherman Timeless Collection 2000
description: The Nat Sherman Timeless Collection 2000 is a sophisticated Dominican lonsdale wrapped in Ecuadorian Connecticut. A smooth, creamy, and refined smoke that embodies Sherman's Timeless Collection hallmarks: balance, elegance, and consistency.

name: Nat Sherman Lightning Bolt
description: A compact, quick-smoking Nat Sherman cigarillo styled in a classic Connecticut Shade. The Lightning Bolt is perfect for the cigar lover who wants a quick, flavorful experience without sacrificing the quality associated with the Nat Sherman name.

name: Nat Sherman Metropolitan Maduro Toro
description: The Metropolitan Maduro Toro wraps Nat Sherman's refined Dominican blend in a dark Connecticut Broadleaf, adding sweetness and depth to the traditionally smooth Metropolitan profile. A medium-bodied toro with excellent construction and balance.

name: Nat Sherman Host Selection Toro
description: The Host Selection Toro is a larger format in Nat Sherman's classic Host line, featuring a Connecticut Shade wrapper over Honduran and Dominican tobaccos. A mild-medium cigar for relaxed, leisurely enjoyment — refined and consistent.

name: Quesada Casa Magna Robusto
description: The Quesada Casa Magna Robusto is a Cigar of the Year contender featuring a 100% Nicaraguan puro composition with a Jalapa wrapper. Bold, complex, and constructed with Quesada's trademark precision — one of the finest Nicaraguan puros available.

name: Quesada Casa Magna Gordo
description: The Casa Magna Gordo is the widest ring gauge offering in the Casa Magna family, using all Nicaraguan Jalapa tobaccos for a bold, full-flavored smoke. The larger format allows the complex Nicaraguan flavors to fully develop over a substantial smoking time.

name: Quesada Casa Magna Colorado
description: The Casa Magna Colorado uses a colorado-shade Nicaraguan natural wrapper that tempers the line's full-bodied reputation into a medium-full smoke with cedar, earthy, and leather notes. More approachable than the dark expressions but equally complex.

name: Quesada Espana Conchas
description: The Quesada Espana Conchas is a small-format cigar from the Espana collection, featuring an Ecuadorian Connecticut wrapper over a classic Dominican blend. Smooth, mild, and refined — a quick, satisfying smoke with Quesada's signature Dominican character.

name: Quesada Espana Robusto
description: The Quesada Espana Robusto is a smooth, mild-to-medium Dominican cigar wrapped in Ecuadorian Connecticut leaf. Part of the Espana collection honoring the Quesada family's Spanish heritage, it delivers a refined, balanced, and creamy smoking experience.

name: Quesada Taino Robusto
description: Named after the indigenous Taino people of the Caribbean, Quesada's Taino Robusto uses a Honduran Habano wrapper over Dominican and Nicaraguan tobaccos. A medium-bodied cigar with earthy, spicy notes and excellent balance.

name: Quesada Iberian Robusto
description: The Quesada Iberian Robusto honors the family's Iberian roots with a Spanish Rosado wrapper, a rare and elegant choice that imparts a rustic, earthy, and spicy character over a refined Dominican filler blend.

name: Quesada 60th Anniversary Toro
description: Created to celebrate the Quesada family's 60 years in the tobacco business, this limited anniversary toro features an Ecuadorian Habano wrapper over a complex Dominican and Nicaraguan blend. A landmark cigar representing six decades of Dominican craftsmanship.

name: Arturo Fuente ExCaliber Epicure
description: The Fuente ExCaliber Epicure is an elegant lonsdale-size entry in the ExCaliber series, showcasing Honduran and Dominican tobaccos under a natural Honduran wrapper. A medium-bodied, smooth smoke with classic cedar and earthy Honduran character.

name: AVO Syncro Nicaragua Robusto Extra
description: The AVO Syncro Nicaragua Robusto Extra brings Nicaraguan tobacco into AVO's refined Dominican blending tradition through the Syncro platform. The Jalapa wrapper contributes earthy spice and body to AVO's typically elegant framework.

name: Gran Habano No. 5 Habano Toro
description: Gran Habano's No. 5 Habano Toro is a longer expression of the popular Habano line, allowing the earthy and spicy Honduran Habano wrapper to fully develop over a 70-minute smoke. Consistent, well-made, and excellent for the price.

name: Nat Sherman Timeless Prestige Torpedo
description: The Timeless Prestige Torpedo concentrates the dark, sweet flavors of the Pennsylvania Broadleaf Maduro wrapper into a tapered belicoso shape that sharpens and focuses every draw. A refined, elegant maduro cigar in the Nat Sherman tradition.

name: Quesada Reserva Privada Toro
description: The Quesada Reserva Privada Toro is the flagship larger format of the Reserva Privada line, a blend of aged Dominican and Nicaraguan tobaccos under an Ecuadorian Habano wrapper. Complex and well-balanced, it is one of Quesada's finest regular production offerings.
